First Strike.notes: Boost amount comes from creature sheet value.

Quick Recovery.notes: Wiki: lower HP => higher regen boost; numeric function not specified in sheet.

Last Stand.notes: Wiki: deals increased poison over time; exact magnitude not provided in sheet.

Breath Resistance.notes: Value should be interpreted as fraction (1.0=100% immune to breath damage).

Aura (Disease).notes: TS stand-and-fight approximation: pulses Disease on the in-range opponent every 3 seconds.

Grim Lariat.notes: TS stand-and-fight approximation: 60s cooldown, guaranteed hit on the single opponent, deals 50% of current damage, and applies 8 Heartbroken.

Ligament Tear.notes: Applies Torn Ligaments on hit; current stand-and-fight model intentionally ignores stamina, glide, and movement penalties.

Stubborn Stacker.notes: Replaces specific offensive ailment plushie payloads with creature-specific stat and block bonuses.
